title: CinqStay Hotel Platform Architecture
summary: Reviewed liteAPI integration progress. Discussed the hotel data pipeline: fetching from liteAPI, enriching with manual curation (year built, etc.), and storing in Supabase. Decided to start with 50 boutique hotels in Amsterdam as pilot.
decisions: Use Supabase for enriched hotel data
actionItems: Set up Supabase project for CinqStay

title: Taskboard App Improvements
summary: Deployed taskboard updates. Added new project columns and improved the mobile layout. Password protection working correctly on Vercel.
decisions: Keep taskboard as central project tracker
